violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the walk in cooler and prep unit. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the three bay. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2026

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
The floor tile in the walk-in cooler is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025
